name: matching
description: Pre-interview CV ↔ JD ranker. MiniLM encoder → TAPJFNN hierarchical attention → 14-node bipartite GNN → fit score; optional Constraint-Aware GA shortlist (CAGA) and LLM signal extraction for GA inputs.

capabilities.name: rank
capabilities.description: Rank a batch of CVs against a single JD. Falls back from GNN → TAPJFNN → cosine if checkpoints are missing.

capabilities.name: extract_signals
capabilities.description: LLM-extract per-CV hiring signals (cost, gender_female, cultural_fit, experience_score, salary_alignment) used as inputs to the GA shortlist.

capabilities.name: apply_ga
capabilities.description: Run the constraint-aware GA on a ranked list with budget / diversity / role / min-fit constraints.
